title: senna ruiziana
intro: Senna ruiziana, a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senna ruiziana include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Herbal preparations of Senna ruiziana can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and tinctures, with caution advised due to its potential to cause gastrointestinal side effects when used improperly.
